data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. ZIPPING SCHRUB had the drop on the lead from the rails draw last start but could only manage third, beaten 7 lengths (25.88) at Q Lakeside in a Grade 5 over 457m. Won at his only start from this draw. Leading chance again. 2. HAVE IGNITION turned in a solid run fresh when finishing in the placings at this track in a Grade 4/5 (20.22). Sure to be fitter. Expected to be in this for a long way. 1. FARMOR RELIEF turned in a plain performance last time when seventh at this track over 366m behind Idea's Girl (20.13) in a Free For All. Better than the latest run and deserves another chance. 5. DEATH ADDER is on a run of two minor placings and will be in the mix again.","runners":[8,2,1,5],"exclusive":false}
